value.found_quote: When the agent encounters an operation requiring approval (**Ask** mode), an interactive prompt card appears in your TUI.
value.rationale: The page (Antigravity CLI documentation, a Google offering) describes interactive permission prompts where an interactive prompt card appears in the TUI when an operation requires approval (Ask mode), matching the claim. The page also describes scope-editing behavior and default behaviors. While the page does not explicitly use the phrase "adapting based on sandbox state," the core claim of interactive approval prompt cards in the TUI for explicit user confirmation is clearly substantiated.
